prompt: Write up the Reel Creator as a case study. It's a skill that turns infographic posts into 40-50s vertical motion-graphics reels with ElevenLabs voiceover synced to brand animation. Built with Remotion (React), Whisper for transcription, ElevenLabs for TTS. Two phases: author voice script + scene content.json, then after voiceover is recorded, transcribe, align scenes, render mp4. Has a preflight QA gate that auto-fixes caption/audio/timeline defects. Built by NexusPoint.
